# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Resources/deployments"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "functionAppDeployment"
    properties:
      mode: "Incremental"
      template: 
        $schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
        contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
        resources:
          - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
            apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
            name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
            location: "[parameters('location')]"
            kind: "functionapp"
            identity:
              type: "SystemAssigned"
            properties:
              serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]"
              httpsOnly: true
              siteConfig:
                appSettings:
                  - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
                    value: "[parameters('storageConnectionString')]"
                  - name: "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME"
                    value: "dotnet"
          - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
            apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
            name: "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'StorageRoleAssignment')]"
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('storageRoleDefinitionId'))]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
          - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
            apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
            name: "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'KeyVaultRoleAssignment')]"
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('keyVaultRoleDefinitionId'))]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
          - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
            apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
            name: "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'SqlRoleAssignment')]"
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('sqlRoleDefinitionId'))]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
          - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
            apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
            name: "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'CosmosDbRoleAssignment')]"
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', variables('cosmosDbRoleDefinitionId'))]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
        variables:
          functionAppId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
          storageRoleDefinitionId: "acdd72a3-3385-48ef-bd3c-8c5b0e1f1c4f" # Storage Blob Data Contributor
          keyVaultRoleDefinitionId: "b3b0c1f7-1b6e-4c1d-9c8f-5b3c9e1f1c4f" # Key Vault Secrets User
          sqlRoleDefinitionId: "b0c1e1f7-1b6e-4c1d-9c8f-5b3c9e1f1c4f" # SQL DB Contributor
          cosmosDbRoleDefinitionId: "b3b0c1f7-1b6e-4c1d-9c8f-5b3c9e1f1c4f" # Cosmos DB Account Reader Role
parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
  hostingPlanName:
    type: string
  storageConnectionString:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
